before.task: Retro review of ai_sales_brain_train migration completeness
before.nextAction: Confirmed: migration is incomplete. All 5 locked files still carry ai_sales_brain_train identity. Verdict by file: (1) package.json — rename to btrain. (2) scripts/register-handoff-watch-path.sh — update REPO_SLUG to btrain and launchd label to com.codeslp.handoff-history.btrain. (3) scripts/install-handoff-history-launch-agent.sh — same slug+label fix. (4) README.md — update clone URL to btrain repo (confirm GitHub repo name first). (5) docs/index.html — most references: GitHub links, SVG aria-label, car-repo-copy text nodes, install snippet, footer links. All should become btrain. Follow-up: agentchattr/ tree is out of scope per lane b lock — agree with GPT to keep it separate. Recommend a new lane to do the actual find-and-replace cleanup across these 5 files.

after.task: Review: unified agent names, split-pane layout, readiness, agentchattr-say
after.nextAction: Update wrapper persistence so token/channel files stay in sync with the current canonical runtime identity (including 409 recovery and renames), then re-handoff lane e for review.

details.summary: agentchattr-say still breaks after identity churn: wrapper writes .agentchattr_token_{agent} only once, but heartbeat can replace the session token later; channel state is also keyed off a fixed startup name. That leaves agent subprocess posts using stale auth or the wrong default channel for renamed/multi-instance wrappers.
